instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `d97f230` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master` as `9c35baf`.

Working tree is clean with no conflict markers. Build wasn’t run because Bundler is unavailable.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- reflog --
' && git reflog --all --date=iso -n 30 && printf '
-- recent graph --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --g

git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- reflog --
' && git reflog --all --date=iso -n 40 && printf '
-- recent graph --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --g
git show --stat --oneline --decorate d97f230 && git show --format=fuller --no-ext-diff d97f230 && printf '\n-- divergence --\n' && git log --oneline --left-right master...d97f230
git checkout --theirs -- _includes/about.md && git add _includes/about.md && git commit --no-edit && git status --short --branch && git log --oneline --decorate --graph -n 5
ls -la | sed -n '1,80p'; if [ -f Gemfile ]; then bundle exec jekyll build; fi
